diagrams.title: Initial Snapshot
diagrams.description: Database administrator triggers and monitors a full initial table snapshot

diagrams.title: Read-Only Incremental Snapshot
diagrams.description: Read-replica use cases: performing snapshots without locking the primary

diagrams.name: error_handling_and_retry
diagrams.title: Error Handling and Retry
diagrams.description: Connector handles retriable and non-retriable errors, manages retry policy
diagrams.scope: Error classification, retry, and fault tolerance

diagrams.name: ddl_schema_change_handling
diagrams.title: DDL Schema Change Handling
diagrams.description: System processes DDL events (CREATE/ALTER/DROP) to update schema metadata

diagrams.name: view_ddl_parsing
diagrams.title: View DDL Parsing
diagrams.description: ANTLR listener actors parse SQL VIEW definitions and extract column metadata

diagrams.title: Data Transformation (SMT)

diagrams.name: wasm_transforms
diagrams.title: WebAssembly (WASM) Transforms
diagrams.description: Developer deploys WASM modules for custom event routing logic

diagrams.name: notifications_and_monitoring

diagrams.description: Monitoring systems receive snapshot lifecycle and progress notifications via Kafka or log channels

diagrams.name: service_registry_and_di
diagrams.title: Service Registry and Dependency Injection
diagrams.description: Framework registers, configures, and injects connector services at runtime

diagrams.title: Custom Type Converters
diagrams.description: Developer registers custom converters to transform column values during CDC

diagrams.name: post_processing_pipeline
diagrams.title: Post-Processing Pipeline
diagrams.description: Developer plugs in post-processors to enrich or filter records after capture

diagrams.title: Kafka Connect Component Discovery

diagrams.name: connector_configuration_management
diagrams.title: Connector Configuration Management
diagrams.description: Operator configures connector properties, applies filters, and validates settings

diagrams.name: kubernetes_operator_management

diagrams.description: Platform engineer uses the Debezium Operator to deploy, scale, and manage connector replicas on Kubernetes
diagrams.scope: K8s operator: deploy, scale, image pull secrets, env vars

diagrams.name: charset_registry

diagrams.description: Connector resolves MySQL/MariaDB character set metadata for correct string decoding
